# technitium_admin_user (Resource)

Manages an admin user on a Technitium DNS Server.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "technitium_admin_user" "ops" {
  username     = "ops-admin"
  password     = var.ops_password
  display_name = "Operations Admin"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `password` (String, Sensitive) Password for the admin user. Write-only; not read back from the API.
- `username` (String) Username for the admin user.

### Optional

- `disabled` (Boolean) Whether the admin user is disabled.
- `display_name` (String) Display name for the admin user.
- `member_of_groups` (String) Comma-separated list of group names the user belongs to.
- `session_timeout_seconds` (Number) Session timeout in seconds for the admin user.
